rules: R1: All values uniform type: damage/amount is int or {min,max}, never array
R2: Move keys are Java byte IDs as strings. name field is human-readable only
R3: HP is always {min, max} object
R4: Effect uses id (not power), amount is Optional (omit if N/A), target is self|player
R5: Cards use id/amount/destination - symmetric with effects
R6: No metadata inside moves/effects/cards. Root _notes only (underscore = skip on deserialize)
R7: Ascension overrides are cumulative: asc4 inherits base, asc9 inherits asc4, etc
R8: Rust types: DynamicValue = Fixed(i32) | Range{min,max}; amount = Option<DynamicValue>
R9: Each entry has id field = Rust MonsterId enum variant name (= top-level key)

FungiBeast.name: Fungi Beast
FungiBeast._notes: Asc17 grow = strAmt+1 in takeTurn. Base strAmt=3, asc2 strAmt=4.

Looter.name: Looter
Looter._notes: Thievery steals gold on unblocked attack damage.

ShieldGremlin.name: Shield Gremlin
ShieldGremlin._notes: Protect gives block to a random ally. Falls back to Shield Bash when alone.

GremlinWizard.name: Gremlin Wizard
GremlinWizard._notes: Charges 2 turns then fires. Asc17: no charge after firing, attacks every turn.

RedSlaver.name: Red Slaver
RedSlaver._notes: Entangle used at most once. No amount needed.

GremlinNob.name: Gremlin Nob
GremlinNob._notes: Enrage = gain Str each time player plays a Skill.

Lagavulin.name: Lagavulin
Lagavulin._notes: Starts asleep with Metallicize. Wakes after 3 turns or on damage.

Guardian.name: The Guardian
Guardian._notes: Has offensive/defensive mode cycle. Sharp Hide 3 (asc19: 4) applied in Close Up.

Hexaghost.name: Hexaghost
Hexaghost._notes: Divider damage = (player_HP / 12 + 1). Inferno upgraded burns at asc19.

Bear.name: Bear
Bear._notes: Always starts with Bear Hug. Cycle: BearHug -> Lunge -> Maul -> Lunge -> Maul...

BookOfStabbing.name: Book of Stabbing
BookOfStabbing._notes: Multi-stab hits increase by 1 each use. PainfulStabs = shuffle Wound on attack.

BronzeOrb.name: Bronze Orb
BronzeOrb._notes: Stasis steals a card. SupportBeam block = 2x # orbs alive. Spawned by BronzeAutomaton.

Byrd.name: Byrd
Byrd._notes: Starts flying. Grounded = stunned, then headbutt -> fly again.

Centurion.name: Centurion
Centurion._notes: Defend gives block to random ally (usually Mystic). When alone, uses Fury instead.

Chosen.name: Chosen
Chosen._notes: Always uses Hex first. Then Poke, then cycles attacks.

Mystic.name: Mystic
Mystic._notes: Heal heals all allies for 16 (asc17: 20). Buff gives Str to all allies.

Romeo.name: Romeo
Romeo._notes: Always starts with Mock. Cycle: Mock -> AgonizingSlash -> CrossSlash.

ShelledParasite.name: Shelled Parasite
ShelledParasite._notes: Suck heals self for damage dealt.

SphericGuardian.name: Spheric Guardian
SphericGuardian._notes: Starts with Activate for block, then cycles attacks. Barricade = block persists.

Taskmaster.name: Taskmaster
Taskmaster._notes: Always uses Scouring Whip. Spawns RedSlaver + BlueSlaver.

TorchHead.name: Torch Head
TorchHead._notes: Minion of BronzeAutomaton. Single move only.

GremlinLeader.name: Gremlin Leader
GremlinLeader._notes: Encourage gives block+Str to all gremlins. Rally spawns new gremlins.

Champ.name: The Champ
Champ._notes: Anger Str = strAmt * 3. Also removes Shackled.

Collector.name: The Collector
Collector._notes: Spawns 2 torchheads. Revive if minions dead. Mega Debuff on first turn.

BronzeAutomaton.name: Bronze Automaton
BronzeAutomaton._notes: Cycles: Boost -> Flail -> Flail -> HyperBeam -> Stunned -> repeat.

Darkling.name: Darkling
Darkling._notes: Revives with half HP when killed unless all Darklings die simultaneously.

Exploder.name: Exploder
Exploder._notes: Explodes for 30 damage after 3 turns if not killed.

Maw.name: The Maw
Maw._notes: Roar first. NomNom hits = turnCount/2 (int div, turnCount starts 1, increments each getMove).

Transient.name: Transient
Transient._notes: Fading = dies after 5 turns. Shifting = damage increases by 10 each turn.

WrithingMass.name: Writhing Mass
WrithingMass._notes: Randomly picks move each turn. Reactive = applies Weak/Vulnerable on attack.

GiantHead.name: Giant Head
GiantHead._notes: Count (move 3) increments internal counter. Attacks with 'It Is Time' after 5 turns.

Nemesis.name: Nemesis
Nemesis._notes: Intangible only applied if not already present.

Reptomancer.name: Reptomancer
Reptomancer._notes: Summons SnakeDagger minions. Always summons first.

AwakenedOne.name: Awakened One
AwakenedOne._notes: Phase 1: Slash/SoulStrike + Curiosity. Phase 2 after Rebirth: DarkEcho/Sludge/Tackle. Rebirth at full HP.

TimeEater.name: Time Eater
TimeEater._notes: TimeWarp: after 12 cards played, ends player turn + gains Str. Haste at half HP.

CorruptHeart.name: Corrupt Heart
CorruptHeart._notes: Move 4 also removes negative Str first. Cycle-based extra buffs (Artifact/BeatOfDeath/PainfulStabs/Str+10/Str+50) are AI behavior in Rust.

Dagger.name: Dagger
Dagger._notes: Reptomancer minion. No ascension scaling. First move = Stab, then Explode (kills self).
